::: {.card title="log₂FC Distribution by Imputation Category — Density"}

```{r}
tags$p(style="font-size:.83em;color:#6c757d;margin-bottom:8px;",
       icon("circle-info"),
       " Use the Category Filter in the sidebar to focus on specific imputation patterns.",
       " Hover each curve for per-category counts and DE numbers.")
plotlyOutput("imp_fc_density_plot", height="370px")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:6px;padding:0 2px;">
<b>Interpretation:</b> Categories with LDV in one group and nothing in the other (<em>ldv-none</em>, <em>none-ldv</em>) typically show shifted distributions
— this is expected and biologically meaningful (proteins absent in one condition).
<em>ldv-ldv</em> proteins should show <b>no significant results</b> (excluded from BH correction by design).
A shift in <em>mean-mean</em> or <em>none-none</em> would indicate a genuine condition effect.
</p>
:::

::: {.card title="log₂FC Distribution by Imputation Category — Boxplot" width="45%"}

```{r}
plotlyOutput("imp_fc_boxplot", height="370px")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:6px;padding:0 2px;">
Box spans IQR, whiskers extend to 1.5×IQR; outliers shown as individual points.
Hover an outlier to identify the protein. Large median shifts in <em>none-none</em> confirm genuine biology.
</p>
:::

## Row

::: {.card title="Imputation Category Summary Table" width="50%"}

```{r}
tags$p(style="font-size:.83em;color:#6c757d;margin-bottom:8px;",
       icon("circle-info"),
       " Download buttons: CSV and Excel. Column headers are sortable.")
DT::DTOutput("imp_type_table")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:8px;padding:0 2px;">
<b>Category</b>: imputation type in the numerator condition vs denominator condition.
<b>ldv-ldv</b>: excluded from BH correction → should have 0 significant results (verify here).
High up/down counts in asymmetric categories (<em>ldv-none</em>, <em>none-ldv</em>) reflect proteins
present only in one condition and are expected.
</p>
:::

::: {.card title="Proteins Removed by Missingness Filter" width="50%"}

```{r}
tags$p(style="font-size:.83em;color:#6c757d;margin-bottom:8px;",
       icon("circle-info"),
       " These proteins failed the missingness threshold in all conditions.",
       " Use the column search boxes to filter. Download available above.")
DT::DTOutput("imp_filtered_table")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:8px;padding:0 2px;">
A protein is removed if it does not reach the <b>minimum observed proportion</b> (set in Parameters) in
<em>any</em> condition. Increasing the threshold retains more proteins but with higher missingness.
Check this list to ensure no biologically relevant proteins are systematically absent.
</p>
:::

# Differential expression analysis

## {.sidebar}

```{r de-sidebar}
tags$div(
    style = "padding:4px 0;",

    tags$div(style="font-size:.73em;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;
                    letter-spacing:.08em;color:#00F0BE;margin-bottom:8px;",
             icon("chart-line"), " Volcano Plot"),
    selectInput("de_contrast",    "Select contrast",    choices=NULL, selected=NULL),
    selectInput("de_effect_type", "Effect type",
                choices=c("All proteins"="all_common_effect"), selected="all_common_effect"),
    numericInput("de_n_labels", "Genes to label on volcano",
                 value=20L, min=0L, max=100L, step=5L),
    tags$div(class="text-muted mt-1", style="font-size:.78em;line-height:1.4;",
             icon("circle-info"),
             " Significance thresholds (\u03b1, log\u2082FC) from Parameters."),

    tags$hr(style="border-color:#ffffff30;margin:14px 0;"),

    tags$div(style="font-size:.73em;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;
                    letter-spacing:.08em;color:#00F0BE;margin-bottom:8px;",
             icon("table"), " DEG Table Filter"),
    textInput("de_gene_filter", "Filter table by gene / protein ID",
              value="", placeholder="e.g. SERPINB3, CCL26\u2026"),
    tags$div(class="text-muted mt-1", style="font-size:.78em;line-height:1.4;",
             icon("circle-info"),
             " Partial match, case-insensitive. Use column headers in table for additional filters.")
)
```

## Row {height="540px"}

::: {.card title="Volcano Plot"}

```{r}
tags$p(style="font-size:.83em;color:#6c757d;margin-bottom:8px;",
       icon("circle-info"),
       " Red = significant (non-imputed); orange = significant (imputed); grey = not significant.",
       " LDV/LDV proteins have NA adj.p and are never labelled significant.")
plotlyOutput("de_volcano_plot", height="420px")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:6px;padding:0 2px;">
Dashed lines mark the adj.p (\u03b1) and |log\u2082FC| thresholds set in Parameters.
Hover any point to see gene name, protein ID, fold change, and adjusted p-value.
Use the <em>Effect type</em> selector to switch between all proteins, stable (common) effect, and interaction-driven proteins.
</p>
:::

## Row {height="530px"}

::: {.card title="Deregulogram — Factor-Dependent Effects"}

```{r}
uiOutput("de_dereg_panel_ui")
```

:::

## Row

::: {.card title="Differentially Expressed Proteins Table"}

```{r}
tags$p(style="font-size:.83em;color:#6c757d;margin-bottom:8px;",
       icon("circle-info"),
       " Showing significant proteins for the selected contrast and effect type.",
       " Use the Gene Filter (sidebar) or column-header search boxes to narrow results.",
       " Download CSV or Excel with the buttons above the table.")
DT::DTOutput("de_deg_table")
```

<p style="font-size:.82em;color:#6c757d;margin-top:8px;padding:0 2px;">
Proteins are sorted by adjusted p-value (ascending).
The <b>Imputed</b> flag indicates proteins with at least one LDV or mean-imputed value.
For interaction-effect results, log\u2082FC and adj.p refer to the interaction coefficient, not the main effect.
</p>
:::
